tasks.example:build: deno run -A jsr:@marianmeres/deno-build --root example/src --entry mod.ts --outdir example/dist
tasks.example:watch: deno run -A jsr:@marianmeres/deno-build --root example/src --entry mod.ts --outdir example/dist --watch
tasks.npm:publish: deno run -A scripts/build-npm.ts && cd ./.npm-dist && npm publish --access=public
tasks.rp: deno task release -y && deno task publish
tasks.rpm: deno task release minor -y && deno task publish
